channel.title: Artificial intelligence

item.title: Japanese media groups sue AI search engine Perplexity over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: The publishers say the company illegally ‘copied and stored article content’

item.title: Nvidia earnings set to test Wall Street’s faith in AI boom
item.description: Chipmaker has surged by more than 30% this year, helping propel the broader market to new highs

item.title: Should you say ‘thank you’ to ChatGPT?
item.description: If we don’t watch our manners with machines we may forget to treat people with respect, too

item.title: Musk’s xAI sues Apple and OpenAI over ChatGPT and iPhone integration
item.description: Tech billionaire’s move deepens feud with former ally Sam Altman

item.title: We Computers — a genre-blending, time-bending, poetic novel
item.description: Structured around an ancient storytelling form yet narrated by a fictional AI, this is Hamid Ismailov’s most expansive and imaginative creation yet

item.title: Publishers race to counter ‘Google Zero’ threat as AI changes search engines
item.description: Media groups explore new ways of reaching readers and making money amid arrival of AI tools that affect clicks

item.title: Inside DHL’s AI upgrade: ‘Love it or hate it, you have to work with it’
item.description: The German delivery company says artificial intelligence is not taking jobs, but filling gaps in a stretched workforce

item.title: Who owns the copyright for AI work?
item.description: The US may not think prompts warrant authorship but China disagrees

item.title: Tech stocks are sending a warning
item.description: Sell-off provides a reminder of the risks of the sector’s dominance in public and private markets

item.title: Is it time to sell your AI stocks?
item.description: Avoid the hype — most companies are seeing no return on generative AI spending

item.title: Meta to license AI technology from start-up as in-house models lag rivals
item.description: Partnership with Midjourney marks shift away from internal product development

item.title: The world should prepare for the looming quantum era
item.description: New breakthroughs underscore the technology’s potential and perils

item.title: How AI will change the browser wars
item.description: The ability to steer large audiences to particular digital services has huge strategic value

item.title: Is AI finally Zover?
item.description: There’s a chill in the air

item.title: Brace for a crash before the golden age of AI
item.description: History teaches that tech revolutions follow a predictable cycle of installation followed by creative destruction

item.title: Tech stocks slip as investors rotate towards defensive sectors
item.description: Concerns about durability of AI rally dent sentiment for second day

item.title: The tech ‘sell-off’
item.description: Plus, the homebuilder stock rally, and more on concentration

item.title: My date with an octopus
item.description: Whatever the request, ChatGPT is happy to help, often with unfortunate results

item.title: For stockpickers, AI is already both co-pilot and competitor
item.description: Intuition, judgment and a gift for reading people are some of the hardest skills to mimic

item.title: JPMorgan and MUFG near $22bn data centre financing deal in Texas
item.description: Vantage Data Centers’ ‘Frontier’ facility will cover 1,200 acres to serve AI needs of big tech groups

item.title: Beware America’s AI colonialism
item.description: It is easy to see how tech can become an even greater bargaining chip in US foreign policy

item.title: US tech stocks hit by concerns over future of AI boom
item.description: Warning from OpenAI’s Sam Altman and MIT paper puncture Wall Street’s enthusiasm

item.title: SoftBank held talks with Intel on buying contract chipmaking business
item.description: Japanese group’s approach comes as US manufacturer struggles to attract customers and compete with rival TSMC

item.title: Sympathy Tower Tokyo — a fantastical fable of identity, AI and ChatGPT
item.description: Rie Qudan’s prizewinning Japanese novella packs in themes from crime to architecture, tech to generational disconnect

item.title: Bill Gates funds $1mn AI Alzheimer’s prize
item.description: New competition is latest effort to deploy artificial intelligence to find cures for serious illnesses
